text: Artificial intelligence is changing our world, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major issue is bias, which can occur when AI systems learn from data containing unfair human prejudices, leading to decisions that discriminate against certain groups. Ensuring fairness means actively working to correct these biases. Privacy is another key concern, as AI often uses personal data, so we must protect individuals’ information. Transparency requires that companies explain how their AI makes decisions, so users can understand and trust the technology. Ultimately, responsible AI development involves putting ethics at the heart of design and use, ensuring AI benefits everyone equally without causing harm.
